configurationNotes.driftTypeWeights: Illustrative scaffold scoring only (not Microsoft defaults). Weights are tuned for documentation-first risk calibration examples and intentionally allow ADDED ExternalUser/AnonymousLink/OrganizationWide + Full Control to reach HIGH risk.
configurationNotes.riskThresholds: Illustrative scaffold thresholds only (not Microsoft defaults). HIGH applies at or above the configured high threshold; MEDIUM applies at or above the configured medium threshold.
configurationNotes.tierNotificationFlags: Site-owner notification and high-risk approval flags are omitted from tier configs until those behaviors are wired into scripts; use auto-revert-policy.json for approval-gate behavior.
